name: SCC_SessionSetupReq
title: SCC_SessionSetupReq
syntax: void SCC_SessionSetupReq ( byte SessionID[], byte EVCCID[] )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Session Setup Request is received.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
